channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 24 South Florida scores 4 TDs in a 3 1/2-minute span and hands North Texas its 1st loss
item.description: DENTON, Texas (AP) — Byrum Brown threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores, Jhalyn Shuler returned a fumble 34 yards for South Florida's fourth TD in span of 3 1/2 minutes and the No. 24 Bulls beat North Texas 63-36 on Friday night, handing the Mean Green their first loss this season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Polanco hits winning single in the 15th inning as the Mariners beat the Tigers to advance to ALCS
item.description: Jorge Polanco hit a game-ending single in the 15th inning, and the Seattle Mariners advanced to the AL Championship Series by outlasting the Detroit Tigers for a 3-2 victory in the longest winner-take-all postseason game in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: Luke Olson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Albert Pujols has met with the Angels about their managerial opening, AP source says
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Albert Pujols has met with the Los Angeles Angels about returning to their dugout as their next manager, a person with knowledge of the meeting told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shedeur Sanders responds to Rex Ryan's 'embarrassment' criticisms, explains recent 'mime' act
item.description: Shedeur Sanders says he won't engage with negativity after Rex Ryan criticized his behavior, emphasizing his new positive approach with the Browns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Excitement builds for Wrigleyville businesses ahead of Game 4 of NLDS
item.description: It's all on the line for the Cubs once again as Game 4 of the NLDS inches closer, and excitement is starting to build around Wrigley Field, in bars and other area businesses.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lowe, WGN 9

item.title: Angel Reese to make history as first professional athlete in Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Angel Reese is getting a pair of wings. The Chicago Sky star announced on Instagram that she will be walking in the upcoming Victoria's Secret Fashion Show on Oct. 15. It will be the first time a professional athlete will walk the runway in the show.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 3 problems for the Bears to solve ahead of their rematch with the Commanders
item.description: The Chicago Bears are struggling on both sides of the ball, with a poor run game, penalty problems, and a front seven that is struggling to stop the run and apply pressure to the quarterback, but reinforcements are on the way with Kyler Gordon and TJ Edwards expected to return for Week 6.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blake Snell shines on mound and Dodgers hold off Phillies 4-3 for 2-0 lead in NLDS
item.description: Blake Snell had yielded to the Los Angeles Dodgers' bullpen after a masterful start and was just a bystander when the Philadelphia Phillies — without any help from their All-Star trio at the top of the batting order — finally mustered a rally in the ninth inning.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Social Security Administrator Frank Bisignano is named to the newly created position of IRS CEO
item.description: Social Security Administration Commissioner Frank Bisignano was named to the newly created position of CEO of the IRS on Monday, making him the latest member of the Trump administration to be put in charge of multiple federal agencies.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Morse two-way star Superior Garror joins prestigious Silver Pigskin convo
item.description: Superior Garror of Morse High School has become one of the most dynamic two-way players in the county, accumulating 1,310 total yards and 16 touchdowns, and has been recruited by Delaware State head coach DeSean Jackson, Weber State and the University of Washington.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Breitenbach, Fox 5
